references.text: Ito, Y, SR Yadav, YS Chang, S Tagane, P Li & T Ohi-Toma. 2021. Molecular species delimitation reveals underestimated diversity in the tree genus Nothapodytes (Icacinaceae). Plant Systematics and Evolution 308: 1-11.
Sleumer, H. 1971. Icacinaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 7: 1-87

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 21 September 2024

species.citation: E.Mey. ex Arn. , J. Bot. (Hooker) 3 (1840) 155 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 48. = Mappia philippinensis Merr. , PJS 26 (1925) 467 ; Merrill, EPFP 4 (1926) 249; Type: BS 24941 Fenix (L, iso), Mindanao: Bukidnon, near Tangkulan, steep slopes near streams.
species.distribution: Africa, Borneo, China, India, Indian Ocean, Indochina, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Madagascar, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sumatra, Thailand. MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Misamis Oriental (photos), PANAY.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 13 April 2024

species.citation: Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 697 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 12. var. borneensis (Heine) Sleumer, Blumea 17 (1969) 246; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 13; ≡ Platea latifolia var. borneensis Heine, Feddes Repert. Spec. Nov. Regni Veg. 54 (1951) 238. = Platea apoensis Elmer, LPB 8 (1915) 2789; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 489. = Platea philippinensis Merr., PJS 9c (1914) 313; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 489. Distribution: Borneo, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. CAMIGUIN, LEYTE, LUZON: Bataan, Benguet, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Mountain Province, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Lanao, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR. Notes: Primary montane forests. 0-2200(-2400)m. Native.
species.distribution: CAMIGUIN, LEYTE, LUZON: Bataan, Benguet, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Mountain Province, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Lanao, Misamis Oriental (photos), MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR.

species.citation: Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 647 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 11. = Platea fuliginea Elmer , LPB 8 (1915) 2790 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 489.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Borneo, China, India, Indochina, Java, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand. BILIRAN, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Davao, Davao del Sur, PALAWAN.
